note: Bosses at stages 4, 8, 12 carry Draconic-grade weapons and plate armor.

enemies.name: Slave Gladiator
enemies.description: A frightened prisoner forced into the arena. Fights desperately but without skill.

enemies.name: Pit Brawler
enemies.description: A street thug who won his freedom one beating at a time.

enemies.name: Arena Grunt
enemies.description: A seasoned grunt who knows the difference between Heavy and Quick. Finally.

enemies.name: Iron Champion
enemies.description: Stage 4 boss. A former champion who sold his soul for Draconic steel. Reads your moves.

enemies.name: Steel Huntress
enemies.description: Agile archer who targets unprotected limbs from a distance.

enemies.name: Scale Bruiser
enemies.description: Thick scales and a heavy axe — defence and offence in one nasty package.

enemies.name: Chain Duelist
enemies.description: A slippery fighter who mixes Heavy and Quick to stay unpredictable.

enemies.name: Steel Tyrant
enemies.description: Stage 8 boss. A hulking tyrant who wields a Draconic axe like a toy. Favours Heavy — but that's a trap.

enemies.name: Mithril Dancer
enemies.description: Lightning-fast with a mithril blade. If she lands Quick three times, you're done.

enemies.name: Adamantite Crusher
enemies.description: A slow, armored wall. Every Heavy he lands breaks a limb. Do not let him land Heavy.

enemies.name: Elite Archer
enemies.description: A master archer who punishes every Defend lapse. Defend is your only shield against her.

enemies.name: Dragon Champion
enemies.description: Stage 12 final boss. The undefeated champion of twelve seasons. Fights perfectly. You must fight better.
